_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Maintain incident tracking and solution database.
reference_document_element_description: Maintain Records of Processing Activities, including processing purposes, data categories, recipient categories, transfer records, retention periods, and technical and organizational security measures descriptions.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-005 (RC, cosine: 0.546), DQ-T-016 (DQ, cosine: 0.525).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.7/10 (raw 0.370). Shared vocabulary: [maintain]. DCWF-only terms [database, incident, solution, tracking] vs WIDAI-only terms [activities, categories, data, descriptions, measures, organizational] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.873 (P=0.895, R=0.851). P exceeds R by 0.044 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.5%). "Maintain incident tracking and solution database." and "Maintain Records of Processing Activities, including processing purposes, data c" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.556 > STS 0.370 (gap +0.186). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [maintain] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.7%. Shared tokens: [maintain]. DCWF-only: [database, incident, solution, tracking]. WIDAI-only: [activities, categories, data, descriptions, measures, organizational].
